summary: Excellent Chris Chappell matrix captures an energetic late‑'82 show highlighted by Lazy Lightnin, Supplication and a moving Morning Dew.
review: The recording is a high‑quality audience/soundboard matrix praised for its clarity and balance, letting the band’s relaxed yet inventive playing shine through. Reviewers single out the lazy‑lightning‑supplication jam and a heartfelt Morning Dew as show highlights, noting the energetic end‑of‑year vibe of 1982. Overall sentiment is overwhelmingly positive despite one lukewarm comment.

ai_rating.rationale: Fourteen‑star average (5/5 reviews except one 3) and consistent praise for both performance and matrix recording justify a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Chris Chappell’s audience/soundboard matrix is described as crisp, clear and well‑balanced; no dropout or muffling issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic yet relaxed late‑1982 pre‑New Year performance with strong jams on Lazy Lightnin > Supplication and a heartfelt close with Morning Dew.
